narrative:
Washington Township (precinct in Licking County) has 690 registered voters, with 45.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
